other_observers: Andrew Spencer, Mark Peterson, Lisa Edwards, Joey Kellner, Cole Wild, Joe Mammoser, Steve Mammoser; Andrew Spencer, Nathan Pipelow, Andy Boyce found a Ruffed Grouse at this location in September 2005.
specific_location: Hoy Mountain, not far from Utah State line.
description: A smallish brown grouse, with a crest and black tail band. See photo.Behaviors: Sitting on log and walking on grouse.Call: heard drumming once.Plumage: unknown
